headline: Is Charles River (CRL) Quietly Recasting Its Moat Around AI Pathology And Cell Therapy Services?
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Charles River Laboratories and MEDIPOST signed a non-exclusive MOU to collaborate on GMP-compliant testing and commercialization support for cell therapies across APAC and North America, while the company also highlighted major AI-enabled enhancements to its end-to-end digital pathology platform. Together, these moves strengthen Charles River’s role in advanced biologics and cell therapies while using AI-driven workflows to speed studies and support reduced animal use...
